evidences.title: Monad Token Debuts on Coinbase at $3.9 Billion Fully Diluted ...
evidences.content: Monad’s native token MON successfully launched on Coinbase with a $3.9 billion fully diluted valuation (FDV), marking a significant milestone in the cryptocurrency market. The Layer-1 blockchain project completed its initial token offering on Coinbase’s new token sale platform before transitioning to public trading. The token sale exceeded expectations by raising $269 million from more than 85,800 participants across 70+ countries. This impressive participation level demonstrates strong investor confidence in Monad’s vision and technology, despite initial concerns about the pace of the sale. [...] > .@Monad went live less than 24 hours ago > > It already cleared: > – 3.7M daily txns > – 153K active addresses > – 18K contract deployments > > That’s higher day-one activity than most chains in their first year > > 🧵 👇 pic.twitter.com/ggUwfOyjx7 > > — Nansen 🧭 (@nansen\_ai) November 25, 2025 ## Record-Breaking Token Sale Monad’s token sale offered 7.5 billion MON tokens at $0.025 each, representing 7.5% of the total 100 billion supply. Although the sale started somewhat slowly, it eventually attracted widespread interest and became oversubscribed by 1.43x, with commitments exceeding...

evidences.title: Monad to raise $188m in Coinbase's first public token sale - DL News
evidences.content: Last month, rival blockchain project MegaETH sold $50 million worth of its native token at a $1 billion valuation through Sonar, a token sale venue tied to early-stage investing platform Echo. The sale’s popularity vastly exceeded expectations, attracting over $300 million worth of pledged capital. Monad’s token sale ups the ante by valuing the project at $2.5 billion. Some 7.5% of the MON token’s 100 billion starting supply is up for grabs at $0.025 per token. The MON token is used to pay gas fees on Monad. Once the blockchain launches, MON holders can stake their tokens to secure the network. [...] On Monday, the upcoming blockchain project announced it will sell $188 million worth of tokens to retail investors on Coinbase through a newly announced token sale platform. According to Monad, the sale will help decentralise the project by distributing its MON token more broadly among its community. For retail investors, it’s another opportunity to get exposure to a high-risk bet in an unlaunched crypto project. Monad has previously raised a total of $248 million over multiple funding rounds, according to Tracxn, a market data platform. This includes a $19 million seed round in ear...

evidences.title: Monad Token Presale Surpasses $128M Ahead of Mainnet Launch
evidences.content: The sale is the first direct token offering hosted on Coinbase. It is open to participants in over 80 countries, including the U.S. Early-stage activity was steady but slower than expected. Analysts attribute this to investors waiting for final moments to commit larger funds. Currently, the sale sees an additional $693,500 added each hour. The public sale will close on 23 November at 10:00, just ahead of Monad’s mainnet launch on 24 November 2025. ## What Monad Offers Monad is a high-performance Layer 1 blockchain. It is fully compatible with the Ethereum Virtual Machine (EVM). It is designed to reach 10,000 transactions per second with near-instant finality. The platform focuses on three core pillars: [...] A temporary halt occurred in March 2025 when a supermajority was reached at an epoch boundary. The issue was resolved, and stability returned. In September 2025, Monad open-sourced its execution client under the GPL-3.0 license. Previously, in September 2024, the Discord server link was temporarily compromised but later secured. ## Why the Raise Matters The presale demonstrates robust market interest in high-performance Layer 1 solutions. It reflects confidence in EVM compat...

The world is a big place and it's so important to break out of the bubble." evidences.title: From 'Flop' to Success: Monad's MON Token Sale Concludes With ...
evidences.content: Interestingly, just a few days before the event concluded, the demand was evidently lacking, which raised some concerns within the community. ## $270M Raised From 85K participants The team behind the project announced earlier today that 85,820 participants took part in the token sale, and the total raised amount was $269 million. The co-founder, Keone Hon, noted on X that the most “important statistic” was not the millions of raised funds but the number of participants. However, Hon acknowledged that a sizeable portion is “crypto insiders” but believes that many are also newbies. He praised the team for their efforts and added that the mainnet launch is scheduled for Monday. [...] ## Success at Last The final number of $269 million indicates the token sale was oversubscribed, since the initial goal was to raise $187 million. Just a few days before the event concluded, though, the figures were different and quite worrying. ### You may also like: Investigators Flag Coinbase Page Asking For Seed Phrases, Tool Removed Coinbase and Bybit in Talks for Strategic Investment Partnership: Report Brian Armstrong Denies Lobbying Against Bitcoin De Minimis Tax Exemption [...] Within the firs...

evidences.content: According to Monad, the sale will help decentralise the project by distributing its MON token more broadly among its community. For retail investors, it’s another opportunity to get exposure to a high-risk bet in an unlaunched crypto project. This includes a $19 million seed round in early 2023, and a $225 million Series A round that closed in March 2024. evidences.title: Monad token soars 78% as launch excitement and Bitcoin bounce fuel rally – DL News
evidences.content: Between November 17 and 22, Monad sold 7.5 billion MON tokens directly to the public for $0.025 each — giving the blockchain an implied valuation of $2.5 billion. When the Monad blockchain and its MON token launched on Monday, more investors piled in, pushing MON up 78% to almost a $4 billion valuation. The surging price highlights the excitement surrounding the Monad blockchain, which was in development for over three years — a long time compared to rival projects. It also comes as the crypto market bounces back after Bitcoin and other crypto assets suffered a multiweek drawdown kicked off by a market-wide leverage wipeout on October 10. With the top crypto recovering around 5% from its lows, smaller assets like MON are benefitting from the bullish impulse. ## Strong start [...] Most investors who purchased the token during the sale were able to sell it immediately after the blockchain launched. However, Coinbase said those who do will find it harder to receive allocations in future tokens sales, disincentivising early selling. Tim Craig is DL News’ Edinburgh-based DeFi Correspondent. Reach out with tips at tim@dlnews.com. Monad to raise $188m in Coinbase’s first public token s...

evidences.title: The Hieroglyphic Monad
evidences.content: ## THEOREM IX We see that all this accords perfectly with the Sun and Moon of our Monad, because, by the magic of the four Elements, an exact separation upon their original lines must be made; following which the circulatory conjunction within the solar complement through the peripheries of these same lines is performed, because however long a given line may be, it is possible to describe a circle passing through its extremes, following the laws of the geometricians. Therefore, we cannot deny how useful the Sun and the Moon are to our Monad, in conjunction with the decadal proportion of the Cross. ## THEOREM X [...] ## THEOREM IX We see that all this accords perfectly with the Sun and Moon of our Monad, because, by the magic of the four Elements, an exact separation upon their original lines must be made; following which the circulatory conjunction within the solar complement through the peripheries of these same lines is performed, because however long a given line may be, it is possible to describe a circle passing through its extremes, following the laws of the geometricians. evidences.title: Monad Transformers Step by Step
evidences.content: ## Download This article is available electronically: [PDF ] The source code of this article, in the form of a Literate Haskell script, is also available: [ <Transformers.lhs> ] ## BibTeX Entry [...] # Monad Transformers Step by Step Home | Publications | Talks | Teaching | Gallery | Links | Get a Life! | Impressum || (Transformers.de.html) ## Information Martin Grabmüller: Monad Transformers Step by Step, draft paper, October 2006. 12 pages, A4 format, English. ## Abstract In this tutorial, we describe how to use monad transformers in order to incrementally add functionality to Haskell programs. It is not a paper about implementing transformers, but about using them to write elegant, clean and powerful programs in Haskell. Starting from an evaluation function for simple expressions, we convert it to monadic style and incrementally add error handling, environment passing, state, logging and input/output by composing monad transformers. ## Download
